title: scrophularia koelzii
intro: Scrophularia koelzii, also known as Kashmir figwort, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia koelzii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia koelzii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
